summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Face Verification feature. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification flow tested - UI properly displays all 3 result states (verified/rejected/pending). AI face comparison using GPT-5.2 vision via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/verification/submit returns AI result with confidence score and auto_processed flag
Backend: User verification_status correctly updated based on AI decision
Backend: ai_verification field saved in MongoDB with match, confidence, reason, auto_processed
Backend: Verified verifications have AI auto-approve criteria (match=true, confidence>=80%)
Backend: Rejected verifications from AI have NO-match criteria (match=false, confidence>=70%)
Backend: Pending verifications flagged for manual admin review
Backend: Response includes display info (message, status, ai_result) for frontend
Frontend: Step 1 - ID type selection (Passport, UK Driving Licence, National ID Card) with data-testid attributes
Frontend: Step 2 - Upload ID front/back areas present
Frontend: Step 4 - Result displays: verified (green checkmark), rejected (red warning), pending (amber eye)
Frontend: Continue buttons have data-testid attributes for each step
Frontend: Verified status shows AI confidence percentage
Frontend: Rejected status shows 'Try Again' button and tips
Frontend: Pending status shows '24-48 hours' and 'Manual Review Required' message
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - AI integration with emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat is properly implemented
Auto-approve threshold (80%) and auto-reject threshold (70%) are correctly applied
Response structure properly includes ai_result for frontend display

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All verification flow UI elements present and working)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users with verification submissions during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Face Verification feature is complete. compare_faces_with_ai() uses GPT-5.2 vision via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Auto-approve if match=true and confidence>=80%, auto-reject if match=false and confidence>=70%, else pending for manual review. Frontend VerifyIdentityPage step 4 shows appropriate UI based on status.

mocked_apis.email_service: MOCKED - Email service via Resend not configured. AI face verification is REAL using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.

ai_face_comparison.details: compare_faces_with_ai() uses emergentintegrations.llm.chat with GPT-5.2 vision. Returns {match, confidence, reason, auto_approved}.

auto_reject_path.details: Sets status='rejected' with AI reason as rejection_reason

manual_review_path.condition: AI uncertain (low confidence or conflicting signals)
manual_review_path.details: Sets status='pending', sends email to admin for review

ai_verification_mongodb_field.details: ai_verification object stored with match, confidence, reason, auto_processed fields

frontend_result_states.details: Step 4 shows: green 'Verified!' for verified, red 'Verification Failed' for rejected, amber 'Under Review' for pending
